business_question: How much did the bank earn from lending after paying depositors?

business_question: How much did the bank earn from services and advisory work, not lending?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (Fee and commission income - Fee and commission expense)

business_question: How much did trading and treasury activities contribute to income?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (Trading income + other operating income)

business_question: What is the bank's total revenue this quarter?
calculation_formula: Net interest income + Net fee income + Other non-interest income

business_question: How much did it cost to run the bank this quarter?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (Staff costs + other operating expenses)

business_question: How profitable is the core business before credit losses and tax?
calculation_formula: Total income - Total expenses

business_question: What is pre-tax profit after accounting for credit losses?
calculation_formula: Operating profit - Amortisation of intangibles - Allowances for credit and other losses + Share of profit of associates/JVs

business_question: What is the bottom-line profit belonging to shareholders?
calculation_formula: Net profit before tax - Tax expense - Non-controlling interests

metric_name_vn: Lai co ban tren co phieu
business_question: How much profit is generated per share currently outstanding?
calculation_formula: Net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders / Weighted average number of ordinary shares outstanding
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Lai pha loang tren co phieu
business_question: How much profit per share if all convertible instruments were exercised?
calculation_formula: Net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders / Weighted average number of diluted shares (incl. convertibles)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How large is the bank overall?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (sum of all asset line items on the Balance Sheet)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Tong du no cho vay khach hang
business_question: How much has the bank lent out to customers?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (before deducting allowances for credit losses)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How much money have customers entrusted to the bank?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (sum of all customer deposit line items)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: What is the owners' stake in the bank after all liabilities?
calculation_formula: Total assets - Total liabilities

metric_name_vn: Tai san co trong so rui ro (RWA)
business_question: How much risk-adjusted exposure does the bank carry?
calculation_formula: Sum of each asset multiplied by its regulatory risk weight (Basel/MAS framework)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Gia tri tai san rong tren co phieu (NAV)
business_question: What is each share theoretically worth based on book value?
calculation_formula: Shareholders' equity (excl. perpetual capital securities) / Number of ordinary shares outstanding
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How efficiently does the bank turn interest-earning assets into profit?
calculation_formula: Net interest income / Average interest-earning assets, annualised
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_en: Return on Average Ordinary Shareholders Equity
metric_name_vn: Ty suat loi nhuan tren von chu so huu (ROE)
business_question: How much profit is generated for every dollar shareholders invested?
calculation_formula: Net profit / Average ordinary shareholders' equity, annualised
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty suat loi nhuan tren tong tai san (ROA)
business_question: How efficiently does the bank use its total assets to generate profit?
calculation_formula: Net profit / Average total assets, annualised
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le chi phi tren thu nhap
business_question: How many cents does the bank spend to earn one dollar of income?
calculation_formula: Total expenses / Total income
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: What share of loans are at risk of not being repaid?
calculation_formula: Non-performing loans / Gross customer loans
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How much is the bank setting aside for expected loan losses, relative to its loan book?
calculation_formula: Allowance for credit losses on loans / Average gross customer loans, annualised, in basis points
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le bao phu no xau (NPA Coverage)
business_question: If bad loans were never repaid, how much has the bank already provisioned to absorb the loss?
calculation_formula: Total allowances (specific + general) / Non-performing assets
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: Does the bank hold enough core capital to absorb losses in a severe downturn?
calculation_formula: Common Equity Tier 1 capital / Risk-weighted assets
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How much going-concern capital does the bank hold, including CET1 plus additional Tier 1 instruments?
calculation_formula: (CET1 capital + Additional Tier 1 capital) / Risk-weighted assets
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: What is the full capital cushion, including Tier 2, against risk-weighted exposure?
calculation_formula: (Tier 1 capital + Tier 2 capital) / Risk-weighted assets
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le don bay tai chinh
business_question: How much balance-sheet leverage is the bank carrying relative to its capital base, regardless of risk-weighting?
calculation_formula: Tier 1 capital / Total exposure measure (on- and off-balance sheet), per MAS Notice 637
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le dam bao thanh khoan (LCR)
business_question: Can the bank survive a 30-day severe cash outflow stress scenario?
calculation_formula: High-quality liquid assets / Total net cash outflows over a 30-day stress period, per MAS Notice 651
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le nguon von on dinh rong (NSFR)
business_question: Does the bank fund its long-term assets with stable, long-term funding sources?
calculation_formula: Available stable funding / Required stable funding, per MAS Notice 652
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

metric_name_vn: Ty le cho vay tren tien gui (LDR)
business_question: How much of customer deposits has the bank already lent back out?
calculation_formula: Net customer loans / Customer deposits
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)

business_question: How much client wealth is the bank managing, beyond its own balance sheet?
calculation_formula: Reported directly (total client assets managed, incl. wealth and asset management)
source_document: UOB Group First Quarter 2026 Performance Highlights (official investor presentation)
